name: Mariah williams
ai_summary: Mariah Williams from Augusta, GA has over two years of childcare and tutoring experience and is available FT/PT Monday-Friday. She prioritizes safety during conflicts and is a patient, calm caregiver who creates structured, fun learning environments.
